TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi beforefieldinit ContainerRegistryTaskCustomRegistryCredentials extends System.Object implements class System.ClientModel.Primitives.IJsonModel`1<class Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerRegistry.Tasks.Models.ContainerRegistryTaskCustomRegistryCredentials>, class System.ClientModel.Primitives.IPersistableModel`1<class Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerRegistry.Tasks.Models.ContainerRegistryTaskCustomRegistryCredentials>

Docs.summary: Describes the credentials that will be used to access a custom registry during a run.

MemberSignature.Value: public ContainerRegistryTaskCustomRegistryCredentials ();
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor() cil managed
Public Sub New ()
public string Identity { get; set; }
.property instance string Identity
Public Property Identity As String
member this.Identity : string with get, set

Docs.summary: Indicates the managed identity assigned to the custom credential. If a user-assigned identity this value is the Client ID. If a system-assigned identity, the value will be `system`. In the case of a system-assigned identity, the Client ID will be determined by the runner. This identity may be used to authenticate to key vault to retrieve credentials or it may be the only source of authentication used for accessing the registry.

.property instance class Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerRegistry.Tasks.Models.ContainerRegistryTaskSecretObject Password
Public Property Password As ContainerRegistryTaskSecretObject
member this.Password : Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerRegistry.Tasks.Models.ContainerRegistryTaskSecretObject with get, set

Docs.summary: The password for logging into the custom registry. The password is a secret object that allows multiple ways of providing the value for it.
